name: Mystery Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the bitter chocolate and butter together.
2. Add 3/4 cup of sugar, sifted flour, baking powder, and salt to the melted mixture. Blend well until a smooth batter forms.
3. Combine 1/2 cup of milk and 1 tsp of vanilla in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the milk and vanilla mixture to the chocolate mixture, stirring continuously.
5. Pour the batter into a greased pan.
6. In a small bowl, mix together the white sugar, brown sugar, cocoa powder, and coffee. Sprinkle this mixture over the batter.
7. Place the cake in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 40 minutes.
8. Allow the cake to cool before serving warm or cold with whipped cream.
